title: Constant Contact vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs EmailOctopus: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than EmailOctopus?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
